description:
Description:
This dataset simulates health profiles of 4,000 patients with a variety of lifestyle and genetic risk factors. It is intended for use in predictive modeling and classification tasks in machine learning, particularly for predicting the likelihood of developing a chronic disease. The Disease_Risk column serves as the binary target variable.

| Column Name                | Description                                                                |
| -------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `Patient_ID`               | Unique identifier for each patient.                                        |
| `Age`                      | Age of the patient in years.                                               |
| `Gender`                   | Gender of the patient (`Male`, `Female`, `Other`).                         |
| `BMI`                      | Body Mass Index (kg/m²), a measure of body fat based on height and weight. |
| `Smoking_Status`           | Smoking history: `Never`, `Former`, or `Current`.                          |
| `Alcohol_Consumption`      | Alcohol usage level: `None`, `Moderate`, or `High`.                        |
| `Physical_Activity_Level`  | Activity level: `Low`, `Moderate`, or `High`.                              |
| `Blood_Pressure_Systolic`  | Systolic blood pressure (mmHg).                                            |
| `Blood_Pressure_Diastolic` | Diastolic blood pressure (mmHg).                                           |
| `Cholesterol_Level`        | Blood cholesterol level (mg/dL).                                           |
| `Glucose_Level`            | Fasting glucose level (mg/dL).                                             |
| `Family_History`           | Whether the patient has a family history of the disease (`Yes` or `No`).   |
| `Genetic_Risk_Score`       | Simulated genetic risk score (0–1 scale).                                  |
| `Previous_Diagnosis`       | Past diagnostic status: `None`, `Pre-disease`, or `Diagnosed`.             |
| `Disease_Risk`             | Target variable indicating disease risk (`Yes` or `No`).                   |
